sections.paragraph:
& יִרְמְיָהוּ (יִרְמֶה יָהוּ probably “whom Jehovah has appointed,” from רמה in the Chald. usage), Jeremiah. LXX. Ἱερεμίας, pr.n.-

(1) of a very celebrated prophet, son of Hilkiah the priest, Jer 1:1 27:1 Dan 9:2, etc.-(2) 1Ch 12:13.-(3) 2Ki 23:31 comp. Jer 35:3.-(4) 1Ch 5:24.-(5) 12:4 .-(6) 12:10 .-(7) Neh 10:3 12:1 .
